feedback.text: Current business practice of 'leasing' bought digital products needs to be altered. It fundamentally disempowers consumers, is strictly a brainchild of the 'neverending growing profit'-thoughtschool, which (as we have hopefully fully learned by now) is a dead-end street. It will destroy everything when extrapolated to full maturity. Yes, profits are allowed, but to a healthy degree. Let's stop facilitating and bowing to the unreasonable greed, people!
